_comment: MCP whitelist config — edit here to add/remove tools or methods. Auto-loaded at runtime.

allowed_tools.name: search_skills
allowed_tools.description: Search 60,000+ AI agent skills by keyword or natural language

allowed_tools.name: get_skill
allowed_tools.description: Fetch complete details for a single skill by slug

allowed_tools.name: popular_skills
allowed_tools.description: Get most-downloaded AI agent skills ranked by download count

allowed_tools.name: search_use_cases
allowed_tools.description: Search 342 real-world AI use-cases by task or goal

allowed_tools.name: get_workflow
allowed_tools.description: Return a complete AI agent workflow with tested skill-stack candidates and upgrade path

allowed_tools.name: submit_request
allowed_tools.description: Submit a new skill request to the community wall.

allowed_tools.name: list_requests
allowed_tools.description: Get recent skill requests from the community wall, newest first.

allowed_tools.name: generate_usecase
allowed_tools.description: Generate a use case for a given topic: search skills, score, produce structured use case.
